# hush_apigee_access_privilege (Resource)

Manage Apigee access privileges in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create an Apigee access privilege with an existing app
resource "hush_apigee_access_privilege" "example" {
  name            = "my-apigee-privilege"
  description     = "Apigee privilege with existing app"
  developer_email = "developer@example.com"
  project_id      = "my-gcp-project"
  api_products    = ["my-api-product"]
  app_name        = "my-existing-app"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_products` (List of String) List of API product names
- `developer_email` (String) The developer email address for the Apigee app
- `name` (String) The name of the Apigee access privilege
- `project_id` (String) The GCP project ID

### Optional

- `app_config` (Block List, Max: 1) Configuration for creating a new Apigee developer app. Mutually exclusive with app_name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--app_config))
- `app_name` (String) The name of an existing Apigee developer app. Mutually exclusive with app_config.
- `description` (String) The description of the Apigee access privilege

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Apigee access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege

<a id="nestedblock--app_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `app_config`

Required:

- `display_name` (String) The display name for the new Apigee developer app
